pi_items.source: Web search for Mauna Kea coordinates.
Web search for Mauna Kea coordinates. West is represented as negative.
Web search for Mauna Kea altitude, confirming it is roughly 4205m.
Web search confirms PHSF is Bradshaw Army Airfield, the standard local weather station code for the Mauna Kea area.
Checked data/stations.txt and data/weather.txt files which explicitly map these NORAD IDs to ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), ISS (NAUKA), and SUOMI NPP respectively.
Matches explicit task prompt instructions ('Minimum elevation: 35 degrees').
Matches explicit task prompt instructions ('Maximum sun elevation: -12 degrees').
Matches explicit task prompt instructions ('Number of passes to predict: 20').

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env astrophotography_pass_optimization task. Verified that real satellite TLEs are used from data directories, explicitly matching NORAD IDs (25544, 48274, 49044, 37849) to the required ISS, CSS, and Suomi NPP modules. Confirmed Mauna Kea coordinates (19.8206N, -155.4681W, ~4205m) and its associated weather station ICAO code (PHSF). Verified all pass predictor configuration parameters perfectly match the explicit task instructions.
